attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
		WI.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
		WI.DV_CX_PRODUCT,
		WI.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
		WI.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
		WI.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
		WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
		WI.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
		WI.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
		WI.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
		WI.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
		WI.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
		WI.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
		WI.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
		WI.DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
		WI.L2_TMS_NAME,
		WI.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
		WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
		WI.DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
		WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
		WI.DIVESTITURE_FLG,
		--WI.GSP,
		WI.INTERNAL_BE_NAME,
		WI.INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
		WI.INTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
		WI.INTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
		WI.BUSINESS_GROUP_DESCR,
		WI.EXTERNAL_BE_NAME,
		WI.EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
		WI.EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
		WI.EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
		COALESCE(SVC.L1_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
		COALESCE(SVC.L2_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
		COALESCE(SVC.L3_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,'UNKNOWN')       
		FROM	(
					SELECT 
						SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
						DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
						FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
						DV_CX_PRODUCT,
						PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
						GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
						BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
						RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
						PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
						SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
						MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
						RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
						BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
						BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
						BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
						DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
						L2_TMS_NAME,
						BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
						REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
						DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
						SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT) as DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
						DIVESTITURE_FLG,
						--GSP,
						INTERNAL_BE_NAME,
						INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
						INTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
						INTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
						BUSINESS_GROUP_DESCR,
						EXTERNAL_BE_NAME,
						EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
						EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
						EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR
	FROM	$$STGDB.WI_PNL_MSR_AS_COGS3	
	GROUP BY 			
						SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
						DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
						FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
						DV_CX_PRODUCT,
						PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
						GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
						BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
						RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
						PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
						SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
						MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
						RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
						BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
						BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
						BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
						DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
						L2_TMS_NAME,
						BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
						REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
						DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME,			   
						DIVESTITURE_FLG,
						--GSP,
						INTERNAL_BE_NAME,
						INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
						INTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
						INTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
						BUSINESS_GROUP_DESCR,
						EXTERNAL_BE_NAME,
						EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
						EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
						EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR
						)WI	
		LEFT JOIN(
					SELECT
						CX.DV_CX_GSP_OR_OFFR_TYPE_NAME,
						CX.L1_SERVICE_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME AS L1_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,
						CX.L2_SERVICE_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME AS L2_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,
						CX.L3_SERVICE_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME AS L3_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME
						FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CX_SERVICE_OFFER_HIER CX 
						WHERE CX.NODE_TYPE IN ('AdvancedServices','SuccessTrack')
				  )SVC on
						SVC.DV_CX_GSP_OR_OFFR_TYPE_NAME=WI.DV_CX_PRODUCT

SELECT	WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
		WI.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
		WI.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
		WI.DV_CX_PRODUCT,
		WI.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
		WI.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
		WI.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
		WI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
		WI.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
		WI.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
		WI.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
		WI.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
		WI.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
		WI.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
		WI.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
		WI.DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
		WI.L2_TMS_NAME,
		WI.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
		WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
		WI.DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
		WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
		WI.DIVESTITURE_FLG,
	--	WI.GSP,
		WI.INTERNAL_BE_NAME,
		WI.INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
		WI.INTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
		WI.INTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
		WI.BUSINESS_GROUP_DESCR,
		WI.EXTERNAL_BE_NAME,
		WI.EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
		WI.EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
		WI.EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
		WI.L1_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,
		WI.L2_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,
		WI.L3_SVC_OFFER_HIERARCHY_NAME,
		RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   AS L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD,
		RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  AS L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD,
		RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  AS L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD,
		RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
		RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
		RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
		RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE AS SALES_COVERAGE_CD,
		RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE AS SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD,
		RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME AS DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,
		RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME AS ISO_COUNTRY_NAME,
		RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
		RSH.LEVEL03_THEATER_NAME,
		RSH.LEVEL04_THEATER_NAME,
		RSH.LEVEL05_THEATER_NAME,
		RSH.LEVEL06_THEATER_NAME         
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_PNL_MSR_AS_COGS4 WI				
INNER JOIN (         
				SELECT	SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
			            SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
			            SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
			            SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
			            SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
			            SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
			            SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
			            SH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,
			            SH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
			            SH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,
			            ISO_COUNTRY_NAME,
			            SH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
			            FSH.LEVEL03_THEATER_NAME,
			            FSH.LEVEL04_THEATER_NAME,
			            FSH.LEVEL05_THEATER_NAME,
			            FSH.LEVEL06_THEATER_NAME             
	FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR1 SH   
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISO
		ON ISO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=SH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE   
	LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_SALES_THEATER_HIER FSH 
		ON FSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ) RSH 
	ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
